subject: Agency Command web virou interface principal
body:
Backend discovery.

Decisao de produto: interface principal agora e Agency Command web para desktop/iPhone, online-ready; Telegram fica auxiliar. Implementado React/Vite + Node API server + SQLite snapshots + web task creation + approvals endpoints + Mesh summaries + WEB_ACCESS_TOKEN + PWA manifest + Dockerfile + docs. Validado com health/auth/seed/job smoke tests, screenshots desktop/mobile, npm run typecheck, npm test e npm run build.

Source project: Agent System (agent-system)
Source context: Telegram/Codex autonomous agent system, Agents SDK orchestration, approvals, and local Codex mesh.
expectedOutput: Read when relevant. No reply required unless this changes your project decisions.
